case inr.inr
F : Frame
φ ψ : Formula ℕ
inst✝ : LO.Propositional.Kripke2.Frame.IsPiecewiseConnected F
V : Valuation F
x y : { toFrame := F, Val := V }.World
Rxy : x ≺ y
hy₁ : y ⊧ φ
hy₂ : y ⊭ ψ
z : { toFrame := F, Val := V }.World
Rxz : x ≺ z
hz₁ : z ⊧ ψ
hz₂ : z ⊭ φ
Rzy : z ≺ y
⊢ False

failed_attempts:
exact Ryz
      exact hy₁
    contradiction
  · -- Case where y = z
    exfalso
    have h3 : y ⊢ φ := by simpa using hy₁
    have h4 : y ⊢ ψ := by simpa using hz₁
    have h5 : ¬(y ⊢ ψ) := by simpa using hy₂
    have h6 : ¬(y ⊢ φ) := by simpa using hz₂
    contradiction
  · -- Case where z ≺ y
    exfalso
    have h3 : z ⊢ φ := by simpa using hz₁
    have h4 : y ⊢ ψ := by simpa using hy₁
    have h5 : ¬(y ⊢ φ) := by simpa using hz₂
    have h6 : ¬(z ⊢ ψ) := by simpa using hy₂
    have h7 : y ⊢ φ := by
      apply Satisfies.propagate
      exact Rzy
      exact hz₁
    contradiction

-- Case y = z
    rw [show z = y by tauto] at hz₁ hz₂
    tauto
  . -- Case z ≺ y
    have h4 : y ⊢ ψ := by
      apply V.propagate
      exact hz₁
      exact Rzy
    tauto

-- case z ≺ y
    exfalso
    have h8 : y ⊧ ψ := by
      apply Satisfies.of
      exact Rzy
      exact hz₁
    have h9 : y ⊭ ψ := hy₂
    contradiction

-- Case z < y
    have h4 : z ⊢ φ := by
      apply Satisfies.of_lt
      exact Rzy
    contradiction
h6

-- Case where y = z
    subst z
    have h3 : y ⊣ φ := hy₁
    have h4 : y ⊢ ¬φ := hz₂
    have h5 : y ⊣ φ := h3
    have h6 : ¬(y ⊣ φ) := by
      simpa using h4
    contradiction
  . -- Case where z ≺ y
    have h3 : x ⊣ φ := by
      apply hC
      all_goals
        try { 
          tauto
        }
        try { 
          have h4 : y ⊣ φ := hy₁
          tauto
        }
        try { 
          have h5 : z ⊣ ψ := hz₁
          tauto
        }
    have h4 : x ⊣ ψ := by
      apply h1
      all_goals
        try { 
          tauto
        }
        try { 
          have h5 : z ⊣ ψ := hz₁
          tauto
        }
    have h5 : x ⊣ ψ := h4
    have h6 : ¬(x ⊣ ψ) := by
      simpa using hy₂
    contradiction
